Singh","details":"This contract is deployed per lending market and holds borrower collateral.      It uses a clone (EIP-1167) pattern where the factory deploys minimal proxies pointing to a single implementation.      Features include:      - Collateral deposits and withdrawals with health checks      - Chainlink oracle integration for price feeds with staleness protection      - Collateral ratio calculations for health monitoring      - Liquidation threshold enforcement","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An constructor.details: Constructor disables initializers for the implementation contract      This prevents the implementation from being initialized directly

depositCollateral(address,uint256).details: Adds collateral to the borrower's positionTransfers collateral from the market to this escrow

params.amount: Amount of collateral tokens to deposit
params.borrowerAddr: Address of the borrower depositing collateral

endLiquidation().details: Ends liquidation process, re-enables normal operations

getCollateralBalance(address).details: Returns raw collateral balance for a borrower

getCollateralRatio(address,uint256).details: Returns the collateral ratio for a borrowerReturns type(uint256).max when debt is 0 (infinite ratio)

getCollateralValue(address).details: Returns both value and raw amount of collateral for a borrower

getHealthStatus(address,uint256).details: Returns detailed health status of a position

returns._0: HealthStatus enum value (HEALTHY, WARNING, or LIQUIDATABLE)

getMaxBorrowable(address).details: Calculates maximum borrowable amount based on current collateral

returns._0: Maximum amount that can be borrowed in borrow asset units

initialize(address,address,address,addre.details: Initializes a cloned escrow instance with market-specific parametersSets default ratios and fetches oracle decimals during initialization

params._borrowDecimals: Number of decimals for the borrow token
params._borrower: Address of the borrower whose collateral is held
params._collateralDecimals: Number of decimals for the collateral token
params._collateralOracle: Chainlink oracle address for collateral price feeds
params._factory: Address of the RevvFiFactory that created this escrow
params._market: Address of the lending market this escrow belongs to

isHealthy(address,uint256).details: Checks if a position meets the minimum collateral requirement

isLiquidatable(address,uint256).details: Checks if a position is eligible for liquidation

isLiquidationActive().details: Checks if liquidation is currently active

params.borrowerAddr: Address of the borrower being liquidated
params.liquidatorAddr: Address that will receive the seized collateral

setLiquidationThreshold(uint256).details: Updates the liquidation thresholdValidates that the new threshold is within acceptable bounds (0 < threshold < 10000)      and that it's not above the minimum collateral ratio

params.newThreshold: New liquidation threshold in basis points

setMinCollateralRatio(uint256).details: Updates the minimum collateral ratioValidates that the new ratio is within acceptable bounds (0 < ratio <= 20000)      and that it's not below the liquidation threshold

params.newRatio: New minimum collateral ratio in basis points

startLiquidation().details: Begins liquidation process, prevents further operations

withdrawCollateral(address,uint256,uint2.details: Withdraws collateral from the borrower's positionEnsures position remains healthy (ratio >= minCollateralRatio) after withdrawal

params.amount: Amount of collateral tokens to withdraw
params.borrowerAddr: Address of the borrower withdrawing collateral
